outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed intraday volatility from positive 0DTE GEX (+2.72B). Risk of volatility spike if spot breaks below 6400 due to negative weekly/monthly GEX (-18B combined). Extreme PCR (>2.7) in longer expiries indicates heavy hedging pressure.
outlook.summary: Market pinned between key structural levels. Spot (6445.5) sits below Gamma Flip (6496) and Max Pain (6495), creating upward magnetic pull. RESONANCE support at 6400 and resistance at 6600 define the trading range. Bearish skew in weekly/monthly expiries contrasts with flat 0DTE, suggesting near-term stability with downside hedging dominating longer-dated options.

levels.motivazione: CONFLUENCE of dominant 0DTE Call Wall (7180 OI), massive unusual volume (17021 - ratio 2.37x OI), Max Pain (6495), and Gamma Flip (6496). Primary magnetic attraction zone. Dealers will defend this level to minimize payout.
RESONANCE across all 3 expirations - significant Put OI (0DTE: 4693, Weekly: 3650, Monthly: 23645). Total combined OI: 31,888. Primary structural support with dealer gamma protection.

Critical gamma equilibrium where cumulative GEX changes sign. Spot currently 50pts below flip = dealers short gamma zone. Movement toward this level accelerates as positive GEX provides stability above it.
RESONANCE level - dominant in all expiries. Monthly shows massive dual interest (Put: 24121, Call: 9933). Also Weekly Max Pain level. Major structural resistance.
CONFLUENCE level - strong Put OI in 0DTE (6464) and Monthly (18524). Bearish smirk skew (ratio 1.37-1.38) in longer expiries validates support strength. Secondary defense below 6400.
Weekly dominant Put strike (5637 OI - highest in expiry). Active volume (3012). Acts as friction zone between 6400 and 6300 support levels. High PCR 2.72 in Weekly confirms bearish hedging.
Strong Put support across all expirations (0DTE: 6446, Weekly: 3211, Monthly: 19313). Deep structural floor. If breached, negative GEX (-18B weekly/monthly) would accelerate selloff.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Negative weekly/monthly GEX amplifies directional moves. Positive 0DTE GEX provides intraday stability. Expect volatility expansion on break of 23400.
outlook.summary: Extreme bearish positioning (PCR 3.03) with smirk skew suggests oversold conditions. Max Pain levels above spot create upward magnetism. 23400 RESONANCE zone is the critical battleground - break below triggers dealer selling, hold suggests bounce toward 23790.

0DTE Max Pain 1.7% above spot. Market maker target zone with upward magnetism. Contrarian pull expected.
